title: YTP: Link Accidentally Ocarina (ILVG-4)
description:
This is my entry to SerialK86's "I Love Videogames Collab 4," the fourth and final installment of the series. Watch the full collab here! -- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dgXjn6Fzqwg&t=3144s

When I was a kid, I grew up playing games on the Nintendo 64, such as StarFox 64, Donkey Kong 64, Kirby 64, Super Smash Bros, Pokemon Snap, and so on. Unsurprisingly, my brother and I also owned Ocarina of Time, which is widely regarded as one of the best video games (indeed it is). However, When I was young I had no patience to actually play through the game, so my early memories of the game are largely from watching my brother.

Some time before graduating college this Spring, I decided that I wanted to experience the game and beat it once and for all, so I started a playthrough. Due to the struggles of finding full-time work and summer vacation travels, I am sadly still in the middle of the playthrough (somewhere inside the Spirit Temple). I'll have to either buy an N64, or bring my old one up to my apartment to finish it... 

Anyway, when SerialK86 invited me to the collab, I figured since I'm playing it, why not make an Ocarina of Time YTP? 

As you might notice, the collab was released on September 27th. This YTP was finished and submitted for the collab in early September. There were a couple reasons I haven't released this video until now. Mainly, I was working simultaneously on another YTP for a different collab (soon to be released!) and wanted to prioritize finishing it before making last-minute corrections to this. Amid starting my full-time engineering job and furnishing my new apartment, I've finally found the time to make corrections to the parts that were bothering me. It's rather short, but I hope you get some enjoyment out of it.

Q&A:

1) Q: What did you use to make this video? A: Sony Vegas Pro 12.0, Paint.NET, AviDemux (for the datamoshing scene at 2:21)
2) Q: What else are you working on? A: I have another collab entry finished, waiting to be uploaded. That collab is going to come out soon and I'm pretty excited about it. Also, I have a YTP in the books of Naoki Urasawa's Monster, which was started in Fall 2017 and will be finished soon.
3) Q: SpongeBob? A: I've been thinking about watching the old episodes (Seasons 1 - 4) with my roommate to get some inspiration for more SpongeBob YTPs, either related to Rip Snortin' time or something new altogether. Before I begin a new YTP, however, I've been very badly needing a computer upgrade. I've been using the same laptop for over 8 years now. Yes, that means this is the SAME laptop that I used for the original It's Rip Snortin' Time. 
4) Q: What is the song at 1:32?  A: A slightly sped-up version of "You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)"

The title was changed on 10/25/19 from "The Ocarina of Sus" to "Link Accidentally Ocarina," which was determined after a long period of deliberation to be a more appropriate title (thank you dinojack9000).
